title: Triangle Area Calculation
description: Calculate area of triangle using various formulas
mermaid: graph TD A1[Start] --> B1[Input Triangle Data] style A1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff style B1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff B1 --> C1{"Base & Height Provided?"} style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1 -- Yes --> D1[Area = 0.5 * Base * Height] style D1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff D1 --> E1[Calculate Area] style E1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff E1 --> J1[Area] style J1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff C1 -- No --> F1{"Three Sides (a, b, c) Provided?"} style F1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 F1 -- Yes --> G1[Calculate Semi-perimeter s = (a + b + c) / 2] style G1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff G1 --> H1[Area = sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c))] style H1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff H1 --> J1 F1 -- No --> I1{"Two Sides (a, b) & Included Angle (C) Provided?"} style I1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 I1 -- Yes --> K1[Area = 0.5 * a * b * sin(C)] style K1 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff K1 --> J1 I1 -- No --> L1[Insufficient Information] style L1 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff L1 --> J1 J1 --> M1[End] style M1 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
entities: "Base & Height Provided?"} style C1 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000 C1 -- Yes --> D1[Area = 0.5 * Base * Height
